title: 有馬記念の後に・Das Versprechen

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash becomes the center of the older
racers' attention after she beats them and feels
confident about beginning her senior year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just when Eishin Flash realizes that completing
her schedule is within the realm of possibility, she
receives a message from her parents.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They tell her they're planning to visit Japan to see
her race in person. She is overjoyed by the news
and vows to win every race leading up to their
visit.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The autumn Tenno Sho becomes her ultimate goal
since that's when her parents will be in Japan. But
first, there's the Osaka Hai to contend with.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, I can't help but feel unnerved by how
many established racers are returning to the
scene to race in the G1 races...
